title: The Kingdom Divided
objective: See how Solomon's unfaithfulness tears the kingdom in two and sets the stage for centuries of decline.

sections.text: Therefore the LORD said to Solomon, 'Since this has been your practice and you have not kept my covenant and my statutes that I have commanded you, I will surely tear the kingdom from you and will give it to your servant.'

title: Elijah & the Prophets
objective: Meet Elijah and see how God sends prophets to call His people back to faithfulness in the darkest of times.

sections.text: And after the earthquake a fire, but the LORD was not in the fire. And after the fire the sound of a low whisper.

title: Israel's Exile to Assyria
objective: See the northern kingdom carried away to Assyria as the consequence of generations of idol worship.

sections.text: And this occurred because the people of Israel had sinned against the LORD their God, who had brought them up out of the land of Egypt from under the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt, and had feared other gods...

title: Judah's Exile to Babylon
objective: See the southern kingdom fall to Nebuchadnezzar and understand God's righteousness and mercy in judgment.

sections.text: The steadfast love of the LORD never ceases; his mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.

title: Isaiah — The Suffering Servant
objective: Encounter Isaiah's prophecy of the Servant who bears the sins of many — and see how clearly it points to Christ.

sections.text: But he was pierced for our transgressions; he was crushed for our iniquities; upon him was the chastisement that brought us peace, and with his wounds we are healed.

title: Jeremiah — The New Covenant
objective: Hear God's promise through Jeremiah of a new covenant written on the heart, fulfilled in Christ.

sections.text: For this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, declares the LORD: I will put my law within them, and I will write it on their hearts. And I will be their God, and they shall be my people.

title: Ezekiel — The Valley of Dry Bones
objective: See God's promise of spiritual resurrection and restoration through Ezekiel's vivid vision.

sections.text: And he said to me, 'Son of man, can these bones live?' And I answered, 'O Lord GOD, you know.' Then he said to me, 'Prophesy over these bones, and say to them, O dry bones, hear the word of the LORD.'

title: The Return from Exile
objective: See God keep His promise as a remnant returns to the land, and understand why even this restoration points forward to something greater.

sections.text: Thus says Cyrus king of Persia: The LORD, the God of heaven, has given me all the kingdoms of the earth, and he has charged me to build him a house at Jerusalem, which is in Judah. Whoever is among you of all his people, may his God be with him, and let him go up to Jerusalem...
